tests.name: Type QP (quadrilateral pyramid): V=5, E=8, triangles=4, quads=1
Type TP (triangular prism): V=6, E=9, triangles=2, quads=3
Exactly 2 combinatorial types for f=5 convex 3-polytopes

sections.title: 1. QP Case (Qa): 3 lateral triangles on partial T

tests.name: Case (Qa) interior faces have DIFFERENT combinatorial types (triangle, quadrilateral)
No rigid motion can map a triangle to a quadrilateral (edge-count invariant)
(Qa) IMPOSSIBLE: weak CTL violated by combinatorial edge-count mismatch

sections.title: 2. QP Case (Qb): 2 lateral triangles + base quadrilateral on partial T

tests.name: (Qb-adj): single-piece family is NON-EMPTY (e.g. b_2 = T-vertex, apex on a distinct T-edge); single-piece degeneracy claim retracted
tests.detail: retraction of earlier bogus argument; see paper Remark rem:hqb-status

tests.name: (Qb-opp): single-piece family is NON-EMPTY (3-parameter family on 3 concurrent T-edges); single-piece degeneracy claim retracted
tests.detail: retraction of earlier bogus argument; see paper Remark rem:hqb-status

tests.name: (Qb) local legacy reduction recorded; H-Qb is discharged by the external hqb_* certificate stack in the current public ledger
tests.detail: see hqb_reduction/perface/asymmetric/opp certificates and phase26e synthesis

sections.title: 3. TP Case (Ta): both triangles + 1 quadrilateral on partial T

tests.name: Triangular prism: both triangular faces are mutually parallel (prism axis direction)
tests.detail: prism top triangle is a translate of bottom triangle

tests.name: Any two distinct T-faces of the regular tetrahedron meet in a common edge and are NOT parallel
(Ta) IMPOSSIBLE: parallel prism triangles cannot lie on non-parallel T-face planes

sections.title: 4. TP Case (Tb): 1 triangle + 2 quadrilaterals on partial T

tests.name: (Tb) interior faces have DIFFERENT combinatorial types (one triangle T2 + one quadrilateral Q_r)
No self-isometry of the triangular prism can map a triangle face to a quadrilateral face (edge-count invariant)
(Tb) IMPOSSIBLE: weak CTL violated by combinatorial edge-count mismatch between T2 and Q_r
tests.detail: triangle F_fwd != quadrilateral F_bwd, or vice versa

sections.title: 5. TP Case (Tc): 3 quadrilaterals on partial T, 2 triangles interior

tests.name: (Tc) forces the 3 lateral prism edges a_i-c_i to lie on 3 DIFFERENT edges of T, namely (v, u_beta), (v, u_gamma), (v, u_alpha)
tests.detail: each a_i-c_i is the intersection of two adjacent lateral quadrilaterals

tests.name: The 3 edges of T emanating from v are pairwise non-parallel (60-degree angles)
(Tc) IMPOSSIBLE: a triangular prism requires 3 parallel lateral edges, which cannot be sub-segments of 3 pairwise non-parallel lines
All 5 sub-cases of f = 5 (QP Qa, QP Qb, TP Ta, TP Tb, TP Tc) are IMPOSSIBLE (unconditional OR conditional on (H-Qb))
Four of the five sub-cases (QP Qa, TP Ta, TP Tb, TP Tc) are closed UNCONDITIONALLY
One sub-case (QP Qb, covering both Qb-adj and Qb-opp) is delegated to the discharged H-Qb certificate stack

cases.name: QP_case_Qa
cases.reason: Interior faces have different combinatorial types (triangle vs quadrilateral); no rigid motion can map one to the other, violating the weak Congruence Transport Lemma for C_5 adjacency.

cases.name: QP_case_Qb
cases.reason: Legacy local Qb reduction.  Both sub-cases Qb-adj and Qb-opp have non-empty single-piece families; exclusion is at the multi-piece face-to-face compatibility level, not at the single-piece level.  Earlier drafts claimed a single-piece degeneracy obstruction that was a notational artefact (apex symbol clashed with T-vertex symbol); that argument is retracted.  The current public stack discharges H-Qb externally via the hqb_* certificate scripts.
cases.reason_type: delegated to discharged H-Qb certificate stack
cases.conditional_on: hqb_* certificates (closed in current public ledger)

cases.name: TP_case_Ta
cases.reason: The two triangular faces of a triangular prism are parallel, but no two T-faces of the regular tetrahedron are parallel.

cases.name: TP_case_Tb
cases.reason: The two interior faces of the prism in Case (Tb) are one triangle and one quadrilateral, of different combinatorial types.  No rigid motion can map one to the other, violating the weak Congruence Transport Lemma for the C_5 congruent adjacency (the shared-face-label matching).

cases.name: TP_case_Tc
cases.reason: Forces the 3 lateral prism edges onto 3 pairwise non-parallel edges of T, incompatible with the prism's defining lateral-edge parallelism.

conditional_hypotheses: hqb_* certificates (closed in current public ledger)
